narrative:
Beavercreek 040 (precinct in Greene County) has 985 registered voters, with 48.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 27.1 percentage points.
